metadata.summary: Aliyun SDK Copyright (C) Alibaba Cloud Computing All rights reserved. http://www.aliyun.com

documentation:
## Aliyun ROS DFS Construct Library

This module is part of the AliCloud ROS Cloud Development Kit (ROS CDK) project.

```python
import * as DFS from '@alicloud/ros-cdk-dfs';
```

classes.name: ros_cdk_dfs.AccessGroup

methods.name: ros_cdk_dfs.AccessGroup.__init__
documentation:
Param scope - scope in which this resource is defined Param id - scoped id of the resource Param props - resource properties.

```
param scope



param id



param props



param enable_resource_property_constraint

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_dfs.AccessGroup.attr_access_group_id
documentation: Attribute AccessGroupId: The ID of the access_group.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::DFS::AccessGroup`, which is used to create a permission group.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosAccessGroup\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-dfs-accessgroup>

methods.name: ros_cdk_dfs.AccessGroupProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `AccessGroup`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-dfs-accessgroup>

```
param access_group_name

Property accessGroupName: The Name of Access Group. The naming rules are as follows: The value contains 6 to 100 characters. Globally unique and cannot be an empty string.

param description

Property description: The description of the access_group. The value contains 0 to 100 characters

param network_type

Property networkType: The NetworkType of Access Group. Valid values: VPC.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_dfs.AccessGroupProps.access_group_name
documentation:
Property accessGroupName: The Name of Access Group.

The naming rules are as follows:
The value contains 6 to 100 characters.
Globally unique and cannot be an empty string.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dfs.AccessGroupProps.description
documentation:
Property description: The description of the access_group.

The value contains 0 to 100 characters

methods.name: ros_cdk_dfs.AccessGroupProps.network_type
documentation:
Property networkType: The NetworkType of Access Group.

Valid values: VPC.

classes.name: ros_cdk_dfs.AccessRule

methods.name: ros_cdk_dfs.AccessRule.__init__
documentation:
Param scope - scope in which this resource is defined Param id - scoped id of the resource Param props - resource properties.

```
param scope



param id



param props



param enable_resource_property_constraint

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_dfs.AccessRule.attr_access_rule_id
documentation: Attribute AccessRuleId: The ID of the access_rule.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::DFS::AccessRule`, which is used to create a rule for a permission group.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosAccessRule\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-dfs-accessrule>

methods.name: ros_cdk_dfs.AccessRuleProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `AccessRule`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-dfs-accessrule>

```
param access_group_id

Property accessGroupId: The resource ID of Access Group.

param network_segment

Property networkSegment: The NetworkSegment of the Access Rule.

param rw_access_type

Property rwAccessType: The read/write permission of the authorized object on the file system. Values: RDWR (default) : read and write. RDONLY: read-only

param description

Property description: The Description of the Access Rule.

param priority

Property priority: The Priority of the Access Rule. Valid values: 1 to 100. NOTE: When multiple rules are matched by the same authorized object, the high-priority rule takes effect. 1 is the highest priority.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_dfs.AccessRuleProps.access_group_id
documentation: Property accessGroupId: The resource ID of Access Group.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dfs.AccessRuleProps.network_segment
documentation: Property networkSegment: The NetworkSegment of the Access Rule.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dfs.AccessRuleProps.rw_access_type
documentation:
Property rwAccessType: The read/write permission of the authorized object on the file system.

Values:
RDWR (default) : read and write.
RDONLY: read-only

methods.name: ros_cdk_dfs.AccessRuleProps.description
documentation: Property description: The Description of the Access Rule.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dfs.AccessRuleProps.priority
documentation:
Property priority: The Priority of the Access Rule.

Valid values: 1 to 100.
NOTE: When multiple rules are matched by the same authorized object,
the high-priority rule takes effect. 1 is the highest priority.

classes.name: ros_cdk_dfs.FileSystem

methods.name: ros_cdk_dfs.FileSystem.__init__
documentation:
Param scope - scope in which this resource is defined Param id - scoped id of the resource Param props - resource properties.

```
param scope



param id



param props



param enable_resource_property_constraint

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_dfs.FileSystem.attr_file_system_id
documentation: Attribute FileSystemId: The ID of the file system.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::DFS::FileSystem`, which is used to create a file system.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosFileSystem\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-dfs-filesystem>

methods.name: ros_cdk_dfs.FileSystemProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `FileSystem`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-dfs-filesystem>

```
param protocol_type

Property protocolType: Protocol type, only support HDFS（HadoopFileSystem）.

param space_capacity

Property spaceCapacity: Capacity of the file system. When the actual data volume reaches the file system capacity, data cannot be written. Unit: GB

param storage_type

Property storageType: Type of storage media. Values: STANDARD (default) : standard type. PERFORMANCE: performance type.

param zone_id

Property zoneId: zone id.

param data_redundancy_type

Property dataRedundancyType: Redundancy mode of the file system. Values: LRS (default) : local redundancy. ZRS: in-city redundancy.

param description

Property description: The description of the file system.

param file_system_name

Property fileSystemName: Name of the file system. The naming rules are as follows: The value contains 6 to 100 characters. Globally unique and cannot be an empty string. The value can contain letters and digits and underscores (_).

param partition_number

Property partitionNumber: The reserved parameters.

param provisioned_throughput_in_mi_bps

Property provisionedThroughputInMiBps: Preset handling capacity. Unit: MB/sdata range: 1-5120

param storage_set_name

Property storageSetName: The reserved parameters.

param throughput_mode

Property throughputMode: Throughput mode Values: Standard（default）: standard throughputProvisioned: preset throughput.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_dfs.FileSystemProps.protocol_type
documentation: Property protocolType: Protocol type, only support HDFS（HadoopFileSystem）.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dfs.FileSystemProps.space_capacity
documentation:
Property spaceCapacity: Capacity of the file system.

When the actual data volume reaches the file system capacity, data cannot be written.
Unit: GB

methods.name: ros_cdk_dfs.FileSystemProps.storage_type
documentation:
Property storageType: Type of storage media.

Values:
STANDARD (default) : standard type.
PERFORMANCE: performance type.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dfs.FileSystemProps.zone_id
documentation: Property zoneId: zone id.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dfs.FileSystemProps.data_redundancy_type
documentation:
Property dataRedundancyType: Redundancy mode of the file system.

Values:
LRS (default) : local redundancy.
ZRS: in-city redundancy.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dfs.FileSystemProps.description
documentation: Property description: The description of the file system.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dfs.FileSystemProps.file_system_name
documentation:
Property fileSystemName: Name of the file system.

The naming rules are as follows:
The value contains 6 to 100 characters.
Globally unique and cannot be an empty string.
The value can contain letters and digits and underscores (_).

methods.name: ros_cdk_dfs.FileSystemProps.partition_number
documentation: Property partitionNumber: The reserved parameters.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dfs.FileSystemProps.provisioned_throughput_in_mi_bps
documentation:
Property provisionedThroughputInMiBps: Preset handling capacity.

Unit: MB/sdata range: 1-5120

methods.name: ros_cdk_dfs.FileSystemProps.storage_set_name
documentation: Property storageSetName: The reserved parameters.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dfs.FileSystemProps.throughput_mode
documentation: Property throughputMode: Throughput mode Values: Standard（default）: standard throughputProvisioned: preset throughput.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dfs.MountPoint.attr_mount_point_id
documentation: Attribute MountPointId: The ID of the mount point.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::DFS::MountPoint`, which is used to create a mount target.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosMountPoint\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-dfs-mountpoint>

methods.name: ros_cdk_dfs.MountPointProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `MountPoint`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-dfs-mountpoint>

```
param access_group_id

Property accessGroupId: The ID of the Access Group.

param file_system_id

Property fileSystemId: The ID of the File System.

param network_type

Property networkType: The network type of the Mount Point. Valid values: VPC.

param vpc_id

Property vpcId: The vpc id.

param v_switch_id

Property vSwitchId: The vswitch id.

param description

Property description: The description of the Mount Point.

param status

Property status: The status of the Mount Point. Valid values: Active, Inactive
```

priority: The Priority of the Access Rule. Valid values: 1 to 100.
NOTE: When multiple rules are matched by the same authorized object,
the high-priority rule takes effect. 1 is the highest priority.

documentation: :Property: protocolType: Protocol type, only support HDFS（HadoopFileSystem）

documentation:
:Property:

spaceCapacity: Capacity of the file system.
When the actual data volume reaches the file system capacity, data cannot be written.
Unit: GB

methods.name: ros_cdk_dfs.RosFileSystem.storage_type
documentation:
:Property:

storageType: Type of storage media.
Values:
STANDARD (default) : standard type.
PERFORMANCE: performance type.

documentation: :Property: zoneId: zone id

methods.name: ros_cdk_dfs.RosFileSystem.data_redundancy_type
documentation:
:Property:

dataRedundancyType: Redundancy mode of the file system.
Values:
LRS (default) : local redundancy.
ZRS: in-city redundancy.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dfs.RosFileSystem.description
documentation: :Property: description: The description of the file system.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dfs.RosFileSystem.file_system_name
documentation:
:Property:

fileSystemName: Name of the file system. The naming rules are as follows:
The value contains 6 to 100 characters.
Globally unique and cannot be an empty string.
The value can contain letters and digits and underscores (_).

methods.name: ros_cdk_dfs.RosFileSystem.partition_number
documentation: :Property: partitionNumber: The reserved parameters

methods.name: ros_cdk_dfs.RosFileSystem.provisioned_throughput_in_mi_bps
documentation:
:Property:

provisionedThroughputInMiBps: Preset handling capacity.
Unit: MB/sdata range: 1-5120

methods.name: ros_cdk_dfs.RosFileSystem.storage_set_name
documentation: :Property: storageSetName: The reserved parameters.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dfs.RosFileSystem.throughput_mode
documentation:
:Property:

throughputMode: Throughput mode
Values:
Standard（default）: standard throughputProvisioned: preset throughput

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::DFS::FileSystem`, which is used to create a file system.

